channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Coping With The Disconcerting ‘Jaggedness’ Of LLMs When It Comes To AI Providing Mental Health Guidance
item.description: AI is said to be jagged. This means that AI is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you will get. This applies to AI for mental health too. A...

item.title: AI could spark a new age of learning, but only if governments, tech firms and educators work together
item.description: Former European Commission president José Manuel Barroso and Efekta Education CEO Stephen Hodges on how AI can help resource-strained education system...

item.title: When AI Decides Your Care: The Governance Questions Every Stakeholder Should Be Asking — And Nobody Is
item.description: AI is denying patient care faster than any human can review it. Here are the governance questions insurers, providers, regulators and patients must st...

item.title: Salmon sold at BJ’s Wholesale Club recalled over potential listeria contamination
item.description: The FDA announced a recall of Wellsley Farms Farm-Raised Atlantic Salmon sold at BJ's locations in seven states due to potential listeria contaminatio...

item.title: Fantasy Fiscal: The Economic Dream That Might Have Been
item.description: in a counterfactual, a newly elected Labour government levels with voters, raises taxes, reforms welfare and restores macroeconomic credibility on the...

item.title: High Speed Autonomy - From Racetrack To Highway
item.description: Professional race car driving is thrilling and has innovated significant safety features that translated to passenger cars. AIDOPTATION is leading the...

item.title: The Productivity Trap: The Invisible Cost Of AI Efficiency Is Your Organization's Judgment
item.description: AI is making your teams faster and your organization less capable at the same time. The judgment being lost today is the competitive advantage you wil...

item.title: New U.S. legislation could upend credit card loyalty programs. The Points Guy founder calls the reckoning un-American
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Can I stop my kids from using their inheritance on political causes I oppose?
The ultrawealthy have 3 big secrets on reducing taxes including the way they die
item.description: “Assets like stocks can quietly grow for decades and, when they’re inherited, the tax bill often disappears.”

item.title: Top Hollywood screenwriter warns TikTok’s new tool is at the gates: ‘I hate to say it. It’s likely over for us’
item.description: Seedance 2.0, which is only available in China for now, lets users generate high-quality AI videos using simple text prompts.

item.title: California gas prices surge 40 cents in just 2 weeks as impact of refinery closures weighs
item.description: Refinery closures including Valero's Benicia facility leave California with six operating refineries, driving gas prices to the highest in nation at $...

item.title: Amazon’s Ring decides maybe partnering with a police surveillance firm is a bad idea after wide revulsion at Super Bowl ad
item.description: The Super Bowl ad depicts a lost dog being tracked by cameras throughout a neighborhood using artificial intelligence.

item.title: Americans see bigger tax refunds so far this year as filing season begins at a slower pace
item.description: Americans are getting bigger tax refunds this year, with average refunds jumping to $2,290 - up 10.9% from last year, according to the latest IRS data...

item.title: These might be the winners from the latest round of Chinese AI launches
Why the U.S. shale-oil boom is running out of steam
U.S. stock futures flat as investors digest ongoing tech selloff
These might be the winners from the latest round of Chinese new year AI launches
Living alone? The 'singles tax' that costs $10K a year
item.description: Living alone costs Americans over $10,000 extra per year in what experts call a "singles tax," as apartment rents surge nationwide, new data reveals.

item.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
item.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
